Table DCS_PROFILEFIELD

Card of table DCS_PROFILEFIELD

Name

DCS_PROFILEFIELD

Code

DCS_PROFILEFIELD

DBMS

Snowflake


Description of the table DCS_PROFILEFIELD

---------------------- Pseudocode ----------------------------------

 

 

 

 

1. Initialize a new table in the Presentation Layer in "DB_CONS_PL_(env)" under "PL_COMMON_LAYER" schema

called "DCS_PROFILEFIELD".

 

2. Define the Columns, based on the script provided.

 

3. Define the Constraints

Primary Key (Unique Record Identifier):

DCS_PROFILEFIELD_KEY = MD5(Concatenation of(USER_ID, ORDER_ID, PROFILE_ID, FIELD_NAME, MARKET_CODE,VALID_FROM))

 

 

4. Save the table definition.

 

5. Maintain Data Dictionary

i. Add the column description to each column (from Comment tab in PD).

ii. Mention the Data Classification & PII category for each column and mask them as per standard guideline.

 

6. Set up the data Load type to "Incremental" where history should be captured and the end result styas deduplicated.

 

7. Verify whether the newcoming ingested records in the source already exist in the Presentation Layer with any previous load, based on the

Unique Record Identifier.

i. If Yes, don't propagate them to the Presentation Layer.

ii. If No, propagate them to the Presentation Layer.

 

 

8. Follow the Entity & Attribute level Business Rules defined.

 

9. Use "__WRITE_TS" to set up record validity to maintain history (VALID_FROM, VALID_TO)

 

10. Run the RLS specific script based on the MARKET_CODE (applicable for QAS & Prod).

 

 

 

 

 

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-------------------------------------- Load Type -----------------------------------------------------------------

SCD2

 

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

 

 

 


Check constraint name of the table DCS_PROFILEFIELD

CKT_DCS_PROFILEFIELD


Server validation rule of the table DCS_PROFILEFIELD

%RULES%


Code preview of the table DCS_PROFILEFIELD

drop table DCS_PROFILEFIELD cascade;

--==============================================================
-- Table: DCS_PROFILEFIELD
--==============================================================
create or replace table PL_PROFILING.DCS_PROFILEFIELD (
DCS_PROFILEFIELD_KEY TEXT not null,
USER_ID TEXT not null,
DCS_USER_KEY TEXT not null,
ORDER_ID TEXT,
PROFILE_ID TEXT,
FIELD_NAME TEXT,
FIELD_VALUE TEXT,
MARKET_CODE TEXT not null,
constraint PK_DCS_PROFILEFIELD primary key (DCS_PROFILEFIELD_KEY)
not enforced
);

comment on column PL_PROFILING.DCS_PROFILEFIELD.DCS_PROFILEFIELD_KEY is
'Primary Key. Unique record identifier. ';

comment on column PL_PROFILING.DCS_PROFILEFIELD.USER_ID is
'User identifier. ';

comment on column PL_PROFILING.DCS_PROFILEFIELD.DCS_USER_KEY is
'Primary Key. Unique record identifier. ';

comment on column PL_PROFILING.DCS_PROFILEFIELD.ORDER_ID is
'Order Identifier';

comment on column PL_PROFILING.DCS_PROFILEFIELD.PROFILE_ID is
'ACS profile identifier';

comment on column PL_PROFILING.DCS_PROFILEFIELD.MARKET_CODE is
'Identifier for the Market -> 2 letter Country Code + ''04''';

alter table PL_PROFILING.DCS_PROFILEFIELD
add constraint FK_DCS_PROF_R12_USERP_DCS_USER foreign key (DCS_USER_KEY)
references PL_IDENTITY.DCS_USER (DCS_USER_KEY)
not enforced not deferrable;

alter table PL_PROFILING.DCS_PROFILEFIELD
add constraint FK_DCS_PROF_R8_USERRP_DCS_USER foreign key (USER_ID)
references PL_IDENTITY.DCS_USER (DCS_USER_KEY)
not enforced not deferrable;
